hierarchy.metric_value: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-light tracking-tight text-slate-900 tabular-nums
hierarchy.metric_label: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500

visual_enhancers.gradients: strictly prohibited, use solid colors only
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: strictly prohibited, use opaque backgrounds only

grids_and_layouts.main_container: max-w-7xl mx-auto p-4 sm:p-8 space-y-6 sm:space-y-8
grids_and_layouts.summary_row: grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-7 gap-px bg-slate-200 border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden rounded-sm

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-slate-500 passes contrast against bg-white.
accessibility.aria_labels: Add aria-labels to all icon-only buttons
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key informational elements

SummaryTile.container: bg-white p-4 sm:p-5 relative group flex flex-col justify-between h-full min-h-[120px] hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors
SummaryTile.label: text-[10px] font-semibold text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-[0.2em] mb-4 block
SummaryTile.value: text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-light tracking-tight text-slate-900 tabular-nums
SummaryTile.icon_container: absolute top-5 right-5 text-slate-300 group-hover:text-slate-500 transition-colors

PipelineMetrics.th: pb-3 border-b border-slate-200 text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold text-slate-500
PipelineMetrics.status_cell: py-3 text-sm font-medium text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2
PipelineMetrics.value_cell: py-3 text-right text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 tabular-nums
PipelineMetrics.leads_targeting_block: flex justify-between items-center p-4 bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 rounded-sm mt-4 hover:border-slate-400 hover:bg-slate-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer group
PipelineMetrics.leads_targeting_value: text-lg font-bold text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2

Card.wrapper: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-sm p-4 sm:p-6 shadow-sm
Card.header: flex items-center justify-between mb-6 pb-4 border-b border-slate-100
Card.title: text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-900 flex items-center gap-2

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Open PerformanceTracker.js and completely rewrite its styling to match the Swiss & High-Contrast archetype.

2. Remove ALL gradient classes (`bg-gradient-to-*`), glassmorphism classes (`backdrop-blur-*`, `bg-white/80`), colored texts, and rounded corners (`rounded-xl` or `rounded-lg`). Use strictly `bg-white`, `border-slate-200`, and `rounded-sm`.

3. Drastically increase metric font sizes in `SummaryTile` to `text-3xl sm:text-4xl font-light tracking-tight text-slate-900`. Change metric labels to `text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-slate-500`.

4. Layout the 'Summary Row' using a 1px gap grid approach (`gap-px bg-slate-200 border border-slate-200`) with `bg-white` items inside. This creates a crisp technical grid layout, rather than floating individual rounded cards.

5. Fix Pipeline Metrics: Remove hyperlink-like styles (`text-indigo-600`, `group-hover:underline`). Use solid `text-slate-900` with color-coded status dots (`w-2 h-2 rounded-full`). Do not style data text as clickable links.

6. Convert 'Leads Targeting Next Month' from a dashed underline link to a distinct, full-width block (`bg-slate-50 border border-slate-200 p-4`) within the pipeline card, looking like a call-to-action panel.
7. Remove all colored top border strips (e.g., `h-1 bg-gradient-to-r...`) from all cards. Use a standard `border-b border-slate-100` on the header sections inside the card padding.
8. Change all badge components to flat, high-contrast structural styles (e.g., `bg-slate-900 text-white` for selected/primary actions, `bg-slate-100 text-slate-600` for unselected).
9. Retain all `data-testid` attributes exactly as they are and add them to any newly structured elements.
10. For data tables (Comparison, Pipeline, Accounts), use strict `border-b border-slate-100` on rows, avoiding any tinted row backgrounds unless indicating an alert state.
